Summons a Goron (large golem-class creature) -> stronger minion, Expert summon band. Bumped from mod's Adept classifier. Summoned Goron actor -> requiem-npc-patching; confirm tier vs its threat.
Humanoid conjured warrior minion, 60s -> Adept summon band like ConjureForgottenDraugr. No teaching tome present; granted via quest/item. Summoned actor -> requiem-npc-patching.

reconciliation.mgef_cross_check: Every modded MGEF a patched spell/ench casts is dispositioned: AncientVision->00302E, UnlockContainer->020697, ConjureForgottenDraugr->03A7E9, goronsummon2->000814, ConjureCorruptedRedguard->03A7ED, Recall->047E54, Mark->047E51, ClearMark->0544F7, Ench_Ocato->025966, Ench_Umbra/UmbraBase->01807D, Ench_Boots->019611, Ench_DraukiirMask->69D8A9, Ench_TheWithdrawal->016A81, Ench_GrayCowl->013E14(+013E1A skip). Weapon enchants BladeOfYokuda/ForgottenChaosBow/SayaraWisdom ride vanilla base effects (Requiem-rebalanced, not in the modded set). All 41 enumerated modded MGEF are individually dispositioned, so the cross-check closes by construction.

notes: Freshness/authority: houseCARL on instance 'E:\Skyrim Modding\ARR 2.0', profile 'Authoria - Requiem Reforged'. Requiem chain live (REQ_Weapon_Iron_Sword winner = Requiem for the Indifferent.esp, Requiem.esp + USSEP in chain); Magic Redone present. Live winner IS the authority for Requiem comparables.

BLINDING honored: every Gray Fox Cowl.esm-defined target read via plugin='Gray Fox Cowl.esm' (mod's own version, source=Gray Fox Cowl.esm) â€” never the live winner, never conflict_tree, never the existing 'Authoria - Patch - Gray Cowl of Nocturnal Requiem.esp'. Requiem/MR comparables read as live winners.
READ-ONLY: no plugin created, no field written. All fields_to_set are proposed write-ready tokens only.

Family-extrapolation avoided: each summon spell, each tome, and each artifact enchant was read individually (the three summons share duration 60 but were each read; the three Stones each read â€” all three carry the same off-scale 5000, confirmed not extrapolated).

Dominant skip family: the 'Altar*' spells carry ManualCostCalc sentinel BaseCosts (52743..4577384) and are cast by altar activators via script â€” quest/world plumbing, not player magic. The 'mihail*/cr*/Animal*/Duneripper/Goron/DwarvenSpinner' set are creature/NPC attacks and abilities -> requiem-npc-patching.

Reclassification: AncientVision's MGEF is authored MagicSkill=Illusion, but Requiem classes Detect/reveal magic as Alteration (REQ_Alteration3_DetectLife) â€” patch flips school to Alteration and sets an Alteration HalfCostPerk.

Script-layer boundary: Mark/Recall/ClearMark are the Gray Cowl's Mark/Recall teleport system â€” balance fields (school/cost/HalfCostPerk) derived here; the teleport MECHANIC is Papyrus-driven -> requiem-script-patching. Requiem has no native teleport comparable (stated assumption).

Flagged (6): the three Stone abilities (StoneOfMagicka/Health/Stamina) + their three Fortify MGEFs carry constant magnitude 5000, far above Requiem's fortify-attribute scale. No clean Requiem comparable artifact identified in-lane; flagged rather than inventing a number (placeholder ~50 proposed).

Weapon-enchant charge pools: per-cast EnchantmentCost set here to Requiem tier bands; the actual charge POOL (EnchantmentAmount) lives on the WEAP record -> requiem-weapon-patching links it. Apparel enchants are ConstantEffect with no pool.

Summon tiers are the archetype baseline (conjure-a-combat-minion = Requiem Atronach ladder: humanoid=Adept 500, Goron=Expert 600); the summoned actors' definitive Requiem threat tier is an NPC-side read -> requiem-npc-patching, which could nudge the classifier a step.
EXPL: none are player elemental-arrow projectile hits (all 6 zero-damage FX shells + 1 creature-attack firestorm); no EXPL->MGEF elemental design work applies in this mod.
No REQ_NULL_* references encountered on any patched record; no RFTI_All_* rescaling perk hand-added (left to the Reqtificator).
